descriptions.administrator: Full access to all backoffice areas, roles, users, and groups.
descriptions.manager: Operational access to catalog/orders without full system administration.
descriptions.user: Minimal access. Permissions come from role and extra groups.
descriptions.operator: Customer support role for order operations without system settings.

manage.title: Manage users
manage.description: Allows creating, updating and deactivating users.

bundle.title: Manage users
bundle.description: Includes editing users and user cards.

administrator.title: Edit user card (administrator)
administrator.description: Allows administrators to edit user cards.

manager.title: Edit user card (manager)
manager.description: Allows managers to edit user cards.

all.title: Edit user card (all roles)
all.description: Allows any backoffice role to edit user cards.

view.title: View groups
view.description: Allows reading groups and assigned permissions.

manage.title: Manage groups
manage.description: Allows creating and updating groups and their capabilities.

view.title: View catalog
view.description: Allows reading catalog entities in backoffice.

manage.title: Manage catalog
manage.description: Allows managing catalog entities in backoffice.

view.title: View orders
view.description: Allows reading orders and order details.

manage.title: Manage orders
manage.description: Allows performing order operations in backoffice.

support.title: Customer support actions
support.description: Allows customer support actions in order flow.

view.title: View pricing
view.description: Allows reading pricing dashboards and data.

manage.title: Manage pricing
manage.description: Allows managing pricing settings and recalculation.

view.title: View suppliers
view.description: Allows reading suppliers and supplier data.

manage.title: Manage suppliers
manage.description: Allows managing suppliers and supplier operations.

view.title: View imports
view.description: Allows reading import runs, quality and errors.

manage.title: Manage imports
manage.description: Allows running import and import maintenance actions.

view.title: View schedules
view.description: Allows viewing and managing supplier import schedules.

view.title: View brands
view.description: Allows viewing and managing catalog brands.

view.title: View categories
view.description: Allows viewing and managing catalog categories.

view.title: View SEO
view.description: Allows reading SEO dashboard and SEO/Google settings.

manage.title: Manage SEO
manage.description: Allows managing SEO settings, templates, overrides and Google integration.

view.title: View autocatalog
view.description: Allows viewing autocatalog data and filters.

view.title: View payments
view.description: Allows viewing and managing payment provider settings.

manage.title: Manage Vchasno.Kasa
manage.description: Allows managing Vchasno.Kasa integration and receipts.

settings.title: Nova Poshta settings
settings.description: Allows viewing and managing Nova Poshta sender settings.

manage.title: Manage settings
manage.description: Allows managing operational and system settings in backoffice.

settings.title: Footer settings
settings.description: Allows managing storefront footer contact data.

manage.title: Ad banners
manage.description: Allows managing storefront ad banners and transition animation.

issue.title: Issue loyalty promo codes
issue.description: Allows issuing loyalty promo codes and viewing loyalty analytics.

manage.title: Manage procurement
manage.description: Allows working with procurement recommendations and supplier overrides.
